caption: A male news anchor with dark skin, wearing glasses, a dark suit, a white shirt, and a maroon tie, speaks directly to the camera against a blue and red studio background. A stylized world map and a circular graphic are visible behind him, along with the logo "PLUS POLITICS". At the bottom of the screen, a banner reads "PLUS POLITICS" followed by the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". The lower section of the frame displays various call-to-action texts, including "SUBSCRIBE", "WATCH ON", "WATCH ONLINE", and website addresses such as "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE", "DStv CH 408", "Startimes CH 308", and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV". As the scene progresses, the anchor continues to talk, with slight changes in his facial expression and mouth movements, while the on-screen text and background graphics remain constant.
